name: Chinese Smokey Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub ribs thoroughly with the Chinese Dry Marinade.
2. Let stand at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours.
3. Arrange ribs ends down on cooking grill or place bones upright in rib rack.
4. Smoke-cook until done.
5. Brush ribs with Chinese Barbecue sauce during the last few minutes of cooking.
6. Serve with remaining sauce.
